title: GlyphAtlas
description: A per-font-variant glyph atlas with automatic multi-page growth. In `'sdf'` mode (default) each atlas page is a single-channel R8 `DataTexture` populated by GlyphSdf. One `GlyphSdf` instance is kept per font size so the atlas can mix sizes efficiently. In `'color'` mode pages are RGBA canvas textures that preserve full glyph colour data for emoji and colour fonts.

sections.title: Import
paragraphs: A per-font-variant glyph atlas with automatic multi-page growth.
In `'sdf'` mode (default) each atlas page is a single-channel R8 `DataTexture` populated by GlyphSdf. One `GlyphSdf` instance is kept per font size so the atlas can mix sizes efficiently.
In `'color'` mode pages are RGBA canvas textures that preserve full glyph colour data for emoji and colour fonts.

members.name: new
members.signature: new(family: string, fontStyle: "normal" | "italic", fontWeight: string, pageSize: number, mode: AtlasMode, sdfRadius: number): GlyphAtlas

members.name: getGlyph
members.description: Return metrics for the given character at the given font size.

members.name: getKerning
members.signature: getKerning(prev: string, next: string, fontSize: number): number
members.description: Return the kerning adjustment (in pixels) between two adjacent characters. Positive values add space; negative values pull glyphs together. Optional — callers treat a missing method as zero kerning.

members.name: onPageAdded
members.description: Dispatched whenever a new atlas page is allocated. Listen here to detect unexpected atlas growth (e.g. many unique CJK glyphs or an oversized font size). The payload is the zero-based page index. ts const atlas = pool.getAtlas('Roboto', 'normal', '400'); atlas.onPageAdded.on(idx => console.warn(Atlas page ${idx} added));
